title: alstonia annamensis
intro: Alstonia annamensis, also known as Annam alstonia or Vietnamese alstonia, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Alstonia annamensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders, and even exhibit neuroprotective effects. Alstonia annamensis can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
